evals.prompt: What big events are coming up in the next month?
evals.expected_output: List of upcoming events across all categories with dates, categories, and status indicators

evals.prompt: Show me all sports events in 2026
evals.expected_output: Filtered list of sports events for 2026 with dates and locations

evals.prompt: What space launches are scheduled this year?
evals.expected_output: List of space/rocket launch events with dates and agencies

evals.prompt: Add the FIFA World Cup 2026 starting June 12
evals.expected_output: Event created confirmation with generated event ID

evals.prompt: Export my calendar to iCal format
What changed in the event database recently?
evals.expected_output: List of recent changes with dates and modification details

evals.prompt: Show me events in the United States
evals.expected_output: Filtered list of US events across all categories
Server started confirmation with localhost URL

evals.prompt: What elections are happening globally this year?
evals.expected_output: List of election/politics events with dates and countries
